talk_metadata.talk_title: Targeting Telomeres in Cancer and Aging
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "we think that this is ..."
Speaker said: "we don't fully understand that"
Speaker said: "we have not demonstrated it. It's just a hypothesis"

cognitive_dissonance: Speaker showed that telomerase gene therapy did not increase tumor number in K‑RAS driven mouse lung cancer, then concluded that telomerase activation is safe for humans despite acknowledging species differences

key_data_gaps: No human clinical efficacy or safety data presented
No overall survival or progression‑free survival endpoints
No biomarker‑stratified analysis of telomerase gene therapy responders

crispro_opportunity.description: Telomerase gene therapy is delivered without a predictive biomarker to identify patients who would benefit most.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "understanding these causes of aging will allow us to have biomarkers for early detection of these diseases" but no biomarker was presented for the therapy.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO could develop a telomere‑length or telomerase‑activity signature to select patients for gene‑therapy trials.

crispro_opportunity.description: TRF1 phosphorylation by PI3K/Akt stabilizes telomeres; inhibiting this axis may sensitize tumors to telomere disruption.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "we found that the PI3K/Akt pathway is important for TRF1 stability" and that Akt inhibition decreases TRF1 at telomeres.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model the impact of combined PI3K/Akt inhibition with TRF1 targeting to predict synergistic anti‑tumor effects.

crispro_opportunity.description: Combine telomerase gene therapy with TRF1 inhibitors to prevent potential telomere‑based escape mechanisms.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "we showed that inhibition of TRF1 in mouse models of lung cancer and glioblastoma is effective and not overly toxic".
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can simulate combination dosing schedules and predict therapeutic windows for telomerase activation plus TRF1 inhibition.

cited_competitors.name: AstraZeneca
cited_competitors.context: collaboration to delete a telomere‑binding protein in specific lung cell types

unresolved_questions: What is the long‑term cancer risk of telomerase gene therapy in humans?
Which human biomarkers can predict response to telomerase activation?
How does TRF1 phosphorylation status vary across tumor types and affect therapy?

assets_to_track: Telomere Therapeutics (company developing human telomerase vectors)
